title: odontarrhena cilicica
intro: Odontarrhena cilicica, also known as Dalmatian mint or Turkish pennyroyal, is a perennial plant in the mint family native to the Balkans. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to ease digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Odontarrhena cilicica include its antispasmodic and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive problems and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Odontarrhena cilicica is often used as a tea, essential oil, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
